name: Neon City
description: Fly past an infinite grid of pixel buildings lit by cascading neon signs and drifting street lights. Bass lifts the fog and pumps the street lights, treble flickers the signs, mids cycle the window palette — camera stays stable. Adapted from 'Neon City' by nikitamashchenko (Shadertoy). Enable CAVA audio visualization in settings.
author: PlasmaZones (adapted from nikitamashchenko, Shadertoy)

name: Voxel Terrain
description: Fly through an infinite 3D voxel world with floating islands and overhangs. Audio drives wireframe glow, face emission, and volumetric haze — geometry stays stable. Dark and moody with bright neon edges that pulse with the beat. Enable CAVA audio visualization in settings.
author: PlasmaZones

name: Mosaic Pulse
description: Audio-reactive stained glass mosaic — colorful tiles with pulsing shapes, sparkles, and dithered posterization. Bass drives shape pulse, mids shift hue, treble triggers sparkles. Enable CAVA audio visualization in settings.
author: PlasmaZones

name: Sonic Ripple
description: Concentric audio rings radiate from the zone center — bass kicks launch expanding shockwaves, mids drive ring density, treble sparks the edges. Every beat is visible. Enable CAVA audio visualization in settings.
author: PlasmaZones

name: Spectrum Bloom
description: Polar spectrum contour — the zone boundary morphs with the full frequency spectrum. Bass to treble maps around the circle; every bar defines the shape. Best with 256 spectrum bars. Enable CAVA audio visualization in settings.
author: PlasmaZones

name: Spectrum Pulse
description: Reactive neon energy — bass expands the glow, energy pulses race around borders, spectrum paints a flowing aurora, treble fires off sparks. Enable CAVA audio visualization in settings.
author: PlasmaZones

name: Arch Drift
description: Procedural Arch Linux mountain logo as 95-vertex SDF geometry drifting through scrolling terminal rain, isometric chevron grid, traveling data packets, and CRT scan lines. Logo interior features roiling cloud flow, lightning flashes, rain streaks, animated energy contour waves, summit beacon, and traveling edge pulses with dense per-band audio reactivity
author: PlasmaZones

name: CachyOS Drift
description: Multiple procedural CachyOS logos drawn as SDF geometry, drifting independently through the scene — each facet animates with per-segment audio reactivity, bass shatter, shockwave rings, and faceted edge sparks
author: PlasmaZones

name: EndeavourOS Drift
description: Procedural EndeavourOS tri-sail logo as three overlapping SDF polygon shapes drifting over a constellation network of orbiting dots connected by proximity lines. Logo interior features simplex noise flow tinted per-sail, per-sail bass pulses, summit convergence glow, and shared-edge highlights with a warm purple-to-coral gradient wash background and dense per-band audio reactivity
author: PlasmaZones

name: Fedora Drift
description: Procedural Fedora infinity-f logo drawn as SDF geometry, drifting through the scene — neon tube strokes animate with per-part audio reactivity, bass shatter, shockwave rings, and edge sparks against an icy northern-lights sky
author: PlasmaZones

name: KDE Neon Drift
description: Procedural KDE Neon gear logo drawn as SDF geometry, drifting through the scene — concentric rings, radial teeth, and orbital dots animate with per-part audio reactivity, bass shatter, shockwave rings, and edge sparks
author: PlasmaZones

name: NixOS Drift
description: Procedural NixOS snowflake logo with 6-fold SDF geometry and two-tone twilight gradient fill, drifting through hexagonal Voronoi lattice — aurora curtains, constellation particles, crystal growth lines, and nebula pulse borders with per-arm audio reactivity
author: PlasmaZones

name: openSUSE Drift
description: Iridescent chameleon scale field with thin-film color shifting, Turing pattern markings, curl noise dust particles, and constructive SDF Geeko logo — audio-reactive chromatophore cascade, tail pulse, turret eye, camouflage shimmer, nanocrystal prism bursts, and scale ripple propagation
author: PlasmaZones

name: Tumbleweed Drift
description: Warm desert horizon with wind-carved sand dune textures, rolling tumbleweed pinwheel logos, dust devil vortices, parallax sand particles, erosion flow lines, and bass shockwave rings — audio-reactive wind intensity, multi-layer logo glow, treble sand glints, sandstorm band, wind-etched sandstone labels, and iridescent inner glow. Enable CAVA audio visualization in settings.
author: PlasmaZones

name: Aretha Shell
description: Ghost in the Shell inspired cyberpunk effect with color grading, hex grid, and data streams
author: PlasmaZones

name: Chrome Protocol
description: 3D stacked targeting array — 7 concentric rings raymarched in Z with an orbiting camera, live 7-segment audio readout, rotating HUD panels, hexagonal background grid, and a spectrum-bar strip that replaces the original rolling blocks. Bass breathes the ring thickness and camera orbit, mids drive rotation speed, treble fractures the grid with glitch bands.
author: PlasmaZones

name: Neon Venom
description: Organic bioluminescent venom veins pulse through toxic pools with rising acid bubbles and venomous mist — inspired by Neon Venom
author: PlasmaZones

name: Toxic Circuit
description: Cyberpunk venom overlay with glowing circuit traces, toxic drip effects, digital corruption, and neon shimmer - inspired by Neon Venom aesthetic
author: PlasmaZones

name: Magnetic Field
description: Mouse-reactive magnetic field effect with orbiting particles and energy waves
author: PlasmaZones

name: Nexus Cascade
description: Layered plasma energy with distortion, chromatic aberration, bloom, and zone masking
author: PlasmaZones

name: Plasma Sigil
description: Holographic PlasmaZones icon rendered as a glowing energy sigil: five zone rectangles from the app icon are procedurally recreated with signed distance fields and animated with gradient energy flow, racing perimeter pulses, and energy bridge connections through layout dividers; bass pulses the sigil and expands the glow, mids cycle the gradient palette, treble spawns edge sparks along the icon strokes
author: PlasmaZones

name: Prismata
description: Unified crystalline prismatic overlay — facets and caustics flow across zones; sound reactive; highlighted zones get chromatic fracture and inner resonance
author: PlasmaZones

name: Pulse Flow
description: Lightweight energy aura: zone borders emit flowing energy that spirals inward through ping-pong feedback, building smooth radiant halos; bass drives emission surges and radial pulses, mids shift the spiral topology and cycle colors, treble injects spark traces; designed for full-screen performance
author: PlasmaZones

name: Berry Drift
description: Organic metaball blobs in berry and violet tones with mint sparkles, bubblegum glow halos, and a deep purple-black backdrop
author: PlasmaZones

name: Cosmic Flow
description: Flowing fractal noise with animated color palette - mesmerizing organic patterns
author: PlasmaZones

name: Liquid Canvas
description: Desktop wallpaper becomes a living liquid painting: a procedural flow field distorts the image like paint on flowing water, with multipass bloom and audio-reactive ripples
author: PlasmaZones
